message: Created write staging files with create-new no-follow semantics and added temp reparse regression coverage.
Revalidated parent path immediately before temp creation and added parent-swap regression coverage for the verifier gap.

Fail closed for nested file.write paths because this implementation lacks directory-handle-relative publication semantics for raced ancestors; root-level writes remain supported with temp no-follow checks.
Verified no-follow create-new temp publication, reparse checks before publish, and targeted reparse tests passed.
